expectations.text: Reads the project's brand.md before writing (the output clearly uses its contents)
expectations.evidence: Reads the project's brand.md (Kindling); output is built from its contents.

expectations.text: Does not re-ask scoping questions brand.md already answers (audience, voice, goal)
expectations.evidence: Does not re-ask audience/voice/goal that brand.md already answers.

expectations.text: Uses real proof from the profile (the 52% open-rate stat and/or the Mia Torres testimonial) rather than placeholders
expectations.evidence: Uses the real 52%-vs-21% open-rate stat and the Mia Torres testimonial.

expectations.text: Respects the voice rules (warm, bookish, playful; never calls the send a 'blast')
expectations.evidence: Warm/bookish/playful; never says 'blast', no exclamation pileups.

expectations.text: The email drives the profile's stated quarterly goal — free-to-paid upgrades — with a single CTA
expectations.evidence: Single CTA driving the stated free-to-paid quarterly goal.
